title: Editas Medicine Announces Monetization Financing with DRI Healthcare Trust
text: On October 3, 2024, Editas Medicine sold certain future license fees and payments owed under its Cas9 license agreement with Vertex Pharmaceuticals to a subsidiary of DRI Healthcare Trust for an upfront cash payment of $57 million. Under the agreement terms, DRI received up to 100% of certain future annual license fees payable to Editas, ranging from $5 million to $40 million per year including sales-based annual license fees, and mid-double-digit percentage of $50 million contingent upfront payment. Editas retained rights to fixed annual license fees for 2024 and mid-single-digit million-dollar payment for achievement of certain annual sales milestones. First payment expected in January 2025 and term runs until 2034. The upfront cash payment provides non-dilutive capital for further pipeline development and strategic priorities. Enables company to focus on near-term in vivo gene editing program advancement.
